Interface ITxEnumTrackId

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to the list of unique Track IDs.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("057B4C30-5C61-4B6C-A24D-B02F98BE418F")]
public interface ITxEnumTrackId

Properties

FirstTrackId

Retrives the first Track ID in the list.

string FirstTrackId { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

LastUpdateTime[string]

Returns the time that a given track was last updated.

ITime LastUpdateTime[string trackId] { get; }

Parameters

trackId string

Property Value

ITime

Sample Snippet

NextTrackId

Retrives the next Track ID in the list.

string NextTrackId { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

TrackFeatures[string]

Returns a selection set of features in a given track.

ISelectionSet TrackFeatures[string trackId] { get; }

Parameters

trackId string

Property Value

ISelectionSet

Examples

Sample Snippet

TrackIds

Retrives the Track ID list.

string[] TrackIds { get; }

Property Value

string[]
